prompt: Run a chaos engineering experiment against our payment service — inject failures and see what breaks.
Fuzz test this API endpoint with malformed inputs and tell me every way it fails ungracefully.
Stress-test our auth system. I want to know exactly where it cracks under load — find the breaking point.
This deployment pipeline has never been tested for failure. Deliberately break things and give me a brittleness report.
Find the edge cases that will make our date parsing logic fall apart. I want adversarial inputs that expose every assumption.
We claim our service is fault-tolerant. Prove it or disprove it — simulate node failures, network partitions, and disk full scenarios.
Poke holes in this business plan. I want you to find every weak assumption and structural vulnerability before we pitch to investors.
Run a game-day exercise against our incident response process. Simulate a cascading failure and see if the runbooks actually hold up.
Hit this caching layer with concurrent writes, eviction storms, and cold-start scenarios. I want to see what shatters and what bends.
Our error handling has never been battle-tested. Generate adversarial conditions for every error path and document which ones actually recover gracefully.
